name: Herbed Chicken Mozzarella
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish lightly.
2. Mix the biscuit mix with the Parmesan and all the spices in a bowl. Place the chicken halves skin side down in the baking dish.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Bake for 45 minutes, or until cooked through.
4. Turn the chicken pieces over. Spread the chili sauce evenly over the breasts. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
5. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
